content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
[[File:Lucasfilm.svg|thumb|right|250px|Lucasfilm Ltd. was founded in 1971 by filmmaker [[George Lucas]].]]
A list of events in '''1971''' related to ''Star Wars''.

==January==
*[[January 1|01]] – [[Navin Chowdhry]] is born.
*[[January 8|08]] – [[Susie Porter]] is born.
*[[January 20|20]] – [[Gary Barlow]] is born.
*20 – [[Michael Jibson]] is born.
*[[January 24|24]] – [[Jonathan Aris]] is born.

==February==
*[[February 12|12]] – [[Scott Menville]] is born.
*[[February 22|22]] – [[Callum Greene]] is born.
*[[February 28|28]] – [[Nigel Godrich]] is born.

==March==
*[[March 1|01]] – [[Leland Chee]] is born.
*[[March 5|05]] – [[Yuri Lowenthal]] is born.
*[[March 10|10]] – [[Jon Hamm]] is born.
*[[March 15|15]] – [[Javier Saltares]] is born.
*[[March 16|16]] – [[Todd Nauck]] is born.
*16 – [[Alan Tudyk]] is born.
*[[March 31|31]] – [[Ewan McGregor]] is born.
*31 – [[Mark Newbold]] is born.

==April==
*[[April 16|16]] – [[Christopher Patrick Nolan]] is born.
*[[April 18|18]] – [[David Tennant]] is born.
*[[April 23|23]] – [[D.B. Weiss]] is born.
*[[April 26|26]] – [[Peder Pedersen]] is born.

==May==
*[[May 9|09]] – [[Dave Boat]] is born.
*09 – [[Domenico Neziti]] is born.
*[[May 14|14]] – [[Sofia Coppola]] is born.
*[[May 27|27]] – [[Paul Bettany]] is born.

==June==
*[[June 28|28]] – [[Jesse J. Holland]] is born.

==July==
*[[July 1|01]] – [[Ariyon Bakare]] is born.
*[[July 2|02]] – [[Tait Fletcher]] is born.
*[[July 4|04]] – [[Kate Dickie]] is born.
*[[July 15|15]] – [[Jim Rash]] is born.
*[[July 18|18]] – [[Ryan Church]] is born.
*[[July 19|19]] – [[Alan Marriott]] is born.
*[[July 28|28]] – [[Drew Karpyshyn]] is born.
*[[July 30|30]] - Founding of [[Nelvana]].

==August==
*[[August 1|01]] – [[Nigel Godrich]] is born.
*[[August 4|04]] – [[Stuart Beattie]] is born.
*[[August 10|10]] – [[Justin Theroux]] is born.
*[[August 12|12]] – [[Yvette Nicole Brown]] is born.
*[[August 22|22]] – [[Richard Armitage]] is born.

==September==
*[[September 1|01]] – [[Maury Sterling]] is born.
*01 – [[Landry Q. Walker]] is born.
*[[September 9|09]] – [[Anastasia Heonis]] is born.
*09 – [[Henry Thomas]] is born.
*[[September 12|12]] – [[Doug Goldstein]] is born.
*[[September 17|17]] – [[Ian Whyte]] is born.

==October==
*[[October 5|05]] – [[Sam Vincent]] is born.
*[[October 24|24]] – [[Tom Angleberger]] is born.

==November==
*[[November 20|20]] – [[Joel McHale]] is born.
*[[November 26|26]] – [[Sean James]] is born.

==December==
*[[December 10|10]] - Founding of [[Lucasfilm]]
*[[December 14|14]] – [[John Cassaday]] is born.
*[[December 21|21]] – [[Daniel Bloom]] is born.

==Unknown==
*[[Jamie Christopher]] is born.
*[[Glyn Dillon]] is born.
*[[Sally Guinness]] is born.
*[[Phil Noto]] is born.
*[[Rebecca Roanhorse]] is born.

==Sources==
*''[[Star Wars Year by Year: A Visual Chronicle]]''
*[[Star Wars Year by Year: A Visual Chronicle (updated edition)|''Star Wars Year by Year: A Visual Chronicle'' (updated edition)]]
*''[[Star Wars Year By Year: A Visual History, Updated and Expanded Edition]]''
*''[[Star Wars Year By Year: A Visual History, New Edition]]''
